name: uipath-sites
description: UiPath coded-app plugin that combines frontend design rules, Codex behavior overrides, and the installed UiPath coded-app skill after ensuring the UiPath CLI is available.

interface.longDescription: UiPath Sites teaches Codex to create polished UiPath coded apps by combining frontend design guidance with the installed UiPath coded-app skill. It ensures the UiPath CLI and Codex skills are prepared at session start, then applies Codex-specific override rules for input handling, local verification, login checks, and deploy command behavior.
defaultPrompt: @UiPath Sites create a coded app to display Orchestrator processes.
@UiPath Sites create a Coded Web App using uipath-typescript.
@UiPath Sites build a polished UiPath coded app and deploy with uip codedapp.
